input.question: Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters

payload.question: Compare average grades across course types for winter vs summer semesters

output.sql:
SELECT
  ce.course_type AS course_type,
  ce.semester AS semester,
  AVG(ce.numeric_grade) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count
FROM course_enrollments ce
WHERE ce.semester IN ('Winter', 'Summer')
GROUP BY ce.course_type, ce.semester
ORDER BY ce.course_type, ce.semester;

visualization.description: Average grades by course type for Winter vs Summer semesters
visualization.title: Average Grade by Course Type: Winter vs Summer

payload.sql:
SELECT
  ce.course_type AS course_type,
  ce.semester AS semester,
  AVG(ce.numeric_grade) AS avg_grade,
  COUNT(*) AS enrollment_count
FROM course_enrollments ce
WHERE ce.semester IN ('Winter', 'Summer')
GROUP BY ce.course_type, ce.semester
ORDER BY ce.course_type, ce.semester;
